sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.workflowStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.status,t.priority,t.isRequired,t.assignedToUserId,t.assignedToTeamId,t.assignedToRoleId,CASE WHEN t.assignedToUserId IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('user:',t.assignedToUserId) WHEN t.assignedToTeamId IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('team:',t.assignedToTeamId) WHEN t.assignedToRoleId IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('role:',t.assignedToRoleId) ELSE 'unassigned:' END AS assignmentKey,t.dueDate,t.startedDate,t.completedDate,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,ws.stageName FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.id=:id AND t.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1
